name: Burq Delivery API
description: Burq provides a delivery API and dashboard to help businesses offer on-demand and same-day delivery. The API enables generating quotes from multiple delivery providers, creating and managing deliveries, managing stores, handling orders, and setting up multi-order delivery routes.
